ksa_text: Knowledge of risk management frameworks and processes for data systems, including risk assessment methodologies, risk models and frameworks, risk scoring, and supply chain risk management for data platform vendors.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge case — excluded on balance: knowledge from Data Architecture (affinity 0.35); strategic/implementation framing outweighs governance signals. STRM composite is minimal (0.0000 — likely framework vocabulary mismatch). A Data Owner would be aware of but not accountable for this competency.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 2 match(es) in governance job postings or certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working Data Owner whose mandate centers on policy, oversight, and governance.
